hero.title: Backend Developer
hero.description: I show the path of a person who works with real systems, writes code, makes decisions, and takes responsibility for their outcomes
hero.second_description: Interested in products, architecture, business, and thinking — not info-noise :)

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Backend & Team Lead Developer
about.text1: Developing since 2023. Worked with high‑load B2B systems, TMS platforms, auctions.
about.text2: My approach: clean code, observability, automation, and business value.
about.text3: Co‑founder & Tech Lead of Jammer (accelerator winner, $12k grant)

jammer.title: Jammer (Tech Lead / Co-Founder)
jammer.description: Game marketplace (itch.io‑like) with upload, sale, and review system. Winner of SFedU accelerator SBS Creative 2024, $12k grant from FSI. Built payment module with escrow‑like scheme, implemented GitOps (Kamal + GitHub Actions), cut FCP from 1.8s to 0.4s via Hotwire

trucker.title: Trucker (Backend Engineer)
trucker.description: High‑load B2B TMS platform for Magnit, Miratorg, etc. Built 7 API integrations, set up Sentry monitoring (reduced MTTR from 30 to 8 min), implemented a bot for feature flag audit (saving 6 man‑days/week), deployed PostgreSQL replica reducing master load by 12%

viomitra.title: VioMitra (Team Lead / Backend)
viomitra.description: Online auction platform (bankruptcy, M&A). Built an ASP.NET Core microservice with SignalR, optimized SQL queries (3.9s → 0.18s). Led 4 backend interns → 2 received job offers. Cut onboarding time from 3 weeks to 12 days

purmarili.title: Purmarili
purmarili.description: MPA for a restaurant chain. Fully developed and long‑term maintained a custom admin panel for content management. The project was completed as outsourcing – responsible for the full cycle from architecture to systematic updates

elina.title: Elina Group
elina.description: Web application for real estate sales. Developed key modules: complex property filtering system, map integration, and admin panel for listing management

prostor.title: Prostor Residential Complex
prostor.description: Landing page for a residential complex – a separate module within the Elina Group ecosystem. Implemented an adaptive landing page featuring floor plans, infrastructure, and a request form. Integrated with the common property database

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.description: Always open to new opportunities and interesting projects. Contact me and we'll discuss how I can help bring your ideas to life

404.title: Page not found
404.message: Sorry, this page does not exist. It may have been moved or you entered an incorrect address
